title: DuPont Announces Regular Quarterly Dividend on Common Stock
text: WILMINGTON, Del. , June 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a third quarter dividend of thirty-six cents ($0.36) per share on the outstanding Common Stock of the Company (par value $0.01 per share) payable on September 15, 2023, to holders of record of said stock at the close of business on July 31, 2023.

title: INVESTIGATION ALERT: Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP Investigates DuPont de Nemours, Inc.'s Directors and Officers for Breach of Fiduciary Duties – DD
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP (“Scott+Scott”), an international securities and consumer rights litigation firm, is investigating whether certain directors and officers of DuPont de Nemours, Inc. (“DuPont”) (NYSE: DD) breached their fiduciary duties to DuPont and its shareholders. If you are a DuPont shareholder, you may contact attorney Joe Pettigrew for additional information toll-free at 844-818-6982, or jpettigrew@scott-scott.com. Scott+Scott is investigating wh.

title: 3M Settles 'Forever Chemicals' Lawsuits for $10.3 Billion
text: 3M agreed to pay $10.3 billion to settle "forever chemicals" lawsuits.

title: DuPont (DD) Partners With JetCool for High-Power Electronics
text: DuPont (DD) and JetCool tie up to establish a new sales channel for the latter's sophisticated cooling products in Taiwan and Singapore.

title: DuPont and JetCool Announce Collaboration in Thermal Management for High-Power Electronics
text: Use of Liquid Cooling Solutions in Semiconductor Advanced Packaging Applications Enables Efficient and Sustainable Thermal Management MARLBOROUGH, Mass. and LITTLETON, Mass.

title: DuPont (DD) Presents High-Performance Solutions at Paris Air Show
text: DuPont's (DD) trusted product portfolio offers a wide range of performance advantages, from commercial aviation to space exploration and satellites.

title: DuPont de Nemours: Healthcare Offers Long-Term Growth
text: DuPont's diverse revenue streams and growing healthcare business make it a good long-term investment. Investors should wait for the stock to drop below $60 and yield 2.5% before buying. The company's focus on acquisitions and share buybacks may limit dividend growth.

title: DuPont Showcases High-Performance Solutions for Next-Generation Aerospace Technologies at 54th International Paris Air Show
text: Lightweight and reliable products for mission-critical applications in aerospace, space exploration, and satellites Visit DuPont at Stand E64 in Hall 2B,  19-25 June 2023, Le Bourget, France LE BOURGET, France , June 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont is showcasing solutions for the aerospace industry at the 54th International Paris Air Show, from 19 to 25 June 2023, at Le Bourget, just outside Paris. The company will feature a broad portfolio of aerospace solutions, including materials for space exploration and satellite applications.

title: DuPont Performance Building Solutions Receives 2023 American Chemistry Council (ACC) Sustainability Leadership Award
text: Styrofoam™ Brand ST-100 Extruded Polystyrene Foam (XPS) Recognized in Environmental Protection Category WILMINGTON, Del. , June 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont™ Styrofoam™ Brand ST-100 Extruded Polystyrene Foam (XPS) has received the 2023 ACC Sustainability Leadership Award in the Environmental Protection category.

title: DuPont Introduces Novel Metallization and Finishing Solutions at SUR/FIN Show
text: Advanced process solutions deliver reliability, performance, and sustainability advantages in traditional and emerging applications WILMINGTON, Del. , June 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE:DD) will showcase its novel process solutions for component finishing at SUR/FIN 2023, a conference and trade show dedicated specifically to the surface technology industry.

title: DuPont (DD) Gains on Productivity & Innovation, Destocking Ails
text: DuPont (DD) benefits from healthy demand in water and general industrial, growth though innovation and pricing actions amid weakness in consumer electronics and semiconductor markets.

title: Three chemical giants agree to pay more than $1 billion to settle 'forever chemical' claims
text: The companies Chemours, DuPont and Corteva announced on Friday they have agreed to pay more than $1 billion to settle claims that "forever chemicals" contaminated public US water systems.

title: Jobs Report, Debt Ceiling Vote Send Markets Higher
text: Markets rose after a strong jobs report and Senate passage of the debt ceiling bill, which will avoid a government default.

title: States sue 3M, DuPont over toxic 'forever chemicals' found in drinking water
text: 3M faces a bellwether trial over PFAS, set to begin Monday, that could set the tone for future lawsuits.

title: Chemical Stock Pops on Billion-Dollar Settlement
text: Dupont De Nemours Inc (NYSE:DD) stock is gapping higher today after news that the chemical name is joining Corteva (CTVA) and Chemours (CC) in setting up a $1.9 billion fund to settle multiple lawsuits over their alleged role in polluting drinking water in the U.S. with perfluoroalkyl and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAs).

title: Chemours, DuPont, and Corteva shares rally after settlement deal in drinking water claims
text: Chemours Company, DuPont (NYSE:DD) de Nemours, Inc, and Corteva, Inc have jointly announced a settlement agreement in principle to comprehensively resolve all per and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS)-related drinking water claims of a defined class of public water systems that serve the vast majority of the US population. Shares of Chemours soared 25% to $33.93, while DuPont stock rose 6% to $71.60 and Corteva shares gained 3% to $55.30 in Friday morning trading.

title: Baron & Budd Obtains Massive $1.1 Billion Settlement With DuPont to Resolve “Forever Chemicals” Contamination Suits
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Baron & Budd is proud to announce that DuPont has agreed to pay $1.185 billion to public water systems across the United States that detect PFAS chemicals in their drinking water supplies. The lawsuits allege that DuPont and several other manufacturers sold PFAS-containing products when the companies knew that PFAS compounds would readily contaminate the environment and have the potential to cause human health problems including cancers. Per- and polyfluoroalkyl sub.

title: Chemours, DuPont and Corteva reach agreement to settle PFAS-related drinking water claims, but deny allegations
text: The Chemours Co. CC, +2.34%, DuPont de Nemours Inc. DD, +0.37% and Corteva Inc. CTVA, +0.69% announced Friday an “agreement in principle” to settle all drinking water claims related to perfluoroalkyl and polyfluoroalkyl substances, known as PFAS. “The companies deny the allegations in the underlying litigation and reserve all legal and factual defenses against such claims if they were litigated to conclusion,” the companies said in a statement.

title: Chemours, DuPont, and Corteva Reach Comprehensive PFAS Settlement with U.S. Water Systems
text: WILMINGTON, Del.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Chemours Company (NYSE: CC), DuPont de Nemours, Inc. (NYSE: DD) and Corteva, Inc. (NYSE: CTVA) (the “companies”) today announced they have reached an agreement in principle to comprehensively resolve all PFAS-related drinking water claims of a defined class of public water systems that serve the vast majority of the United States population. The class includes water systems with a current detection of PFAS1 at any level and those that are currently require.

title: 4 Diversified Chemical Stocks to Escape Industry Headwinds
text: Demand softness in certain markets, destocking and raw material cost inflation pose headwinds for the Zacks Chemicals Diversified industry. APD, DD, IOSP and KOP are poised to navigate the industry challenges.

title: DuPont (DD) Launches New Advancement in Plating Chemistry
text: The industrial drive by DuPont (DD) toward smaller, more powerful semiconductor chips is driving innovative advances in packaging applications such as 2.5D and 3D chip packages.
